name: n8n
short_desc: Open-source workflow automation — visual builder with 500+ integrations and built-in AI nodes.
author: n8n GmbH
description: n8n is an extendable workflow automation tool — a self-hosted, fair-code alternative to Zapier and Make. Build automations visually by chaining nodes for HTTP, databases, SaaS APIs (500+ integrations), and built-in AI / LLM agents. Workflows can run on a schedule, be triggered by webhooks, or react to events from other apps. This package bundles n8n v2 with a dedicated Postgres 16 database, a non-root DB user (best-practice security), and an init container that bootstraps file ownership on first boot.

form_fields.label: Postgres Root Password
form_fields.hint: Auto-generated. Postgres superuser password — only used by the init script that creates the n8n non-root user on first boot.

form_fields.label: n8n DB Password
form_fields.hint: Auto-generated. Password for the limited-privileges `n8n` Postgres user that the application connects with at runtime.
